programme.title: Rocky Handsome
programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: Tera Kya Hoga Lovely
programme.desc: A comedy of errors that traverses through the hinterlands of Haryana unfolding crazy dynamics, relationships and eccentricities that occur between family, friends, lovers, and even cops!.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: Mahesh and Meena fall in love but he marries another girl at his father's behest. When Meena takes their baby to Mahesh, he rejects her saying their relationship was a mistake.

programme.title: Rocky Handsome
programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: E107 - Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: E104 - The Parent Zap
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: E501 - Flabber Gassed
programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger & Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E215 - Back Out There / Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, decides to try and cure his post-breakup blues. // Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once owned by Great Grandma Harriet to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: E104 - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: E327 - The Haunted Bucket / Go Fetch!
programme.desc: Spirits roam Bikini Bottom on Halloween after a ghost portal is opened in the Chum Bucket! // When Gary loses his favorite ball in a deep-sea trench, SpongeBob must chase a determined angler fish to retrieve it.

programme.title: E404 - Two Pests in a Teapot / Partial Recall
programme.desc: When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick and Squidina take care of her house. // After Plankton forgets who he is, the Dartfish family adopts him.

programme.title: E115 - The Uncredible Journey
programme.desc: Tinkle, Ouchie, and Pinkeye must venture back home together after being taken away by mistake.

programme.title: E712 - Party Fowl / Sleepless in Royal Woods
programme.desc: When Sergio stays at the Louds, he soon gets into trouble when he doesn't want to hang out with the rest of the pets. // Unable to get Lily to go to sleep, Mom takes her for a drive where they happen to witness a burglary.

programme.title: E713 - Hunn-cut Gems / Can't Lynn Em All
programme.desc: When Liam fills in as a reporter, the school soon falls in love with Liam's life on Hunnicutt Farms. // When Lynn is scouted for her athletic prowess, she soon becomes a professional Wrestler.

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E105 - Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods.

programme.title: E219 - I Know Your Secret
programme.desc: Henry gets a series of mysterious notes from someone and worries that this person may know his secret identity.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E118 - Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: E136 - #GettinWiggy
programme.desc: When Cat takes Dice to Arizona for a hair modeling gig, Sam is stuck at home with an unexpected new roommate for the weekend... Nona.

programme.title: E103 - The Big Game / Get Your Skate On
programme.desc: Bester finds that the only way to get her brother's attention when he's glued to the game, is to be in the game. // Best and Bester stage a crazy publicity stunt for Grafifi's repair shop which has everyone fearing for their lives.

programme.title: E410 - Safety Worst / De-Pat-ment Store
programme.desc: After yet another Star house disaster, the fire marshal forces Patrick to watch a safety training video. // Patrick fails his way up the corporate ladder at Upturn's mall.

programme.title: E412 - Visiting Vikings / It's Too Late...With Plankton
programme.desc: For Leif Erikson Day, Patrick and SpongeBob time-travel back to Viking times. // When the Stars go to the mountains, Squidina hires Plankton to entertain the Lawnies.

programme.title: E213 - The Getaway
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson.

programme.title: E105 - In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

programme.title: E326 - SpongeBob TrashPants / Krusty Kafeteria
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans up all the garbage in town... except for one stubborn ball of trash. // SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs attempt to serve Krabby Patties at Pearl's school without being caught by the strict lunch lady.

programme.title: E327 - The Haunted Bucket / Go Fetch!
programme.desc: Spirits roam Bikini Bottom on Halloween after a ghost portal is opened in the Chum Bucket! // When Gary loses his favorite ball in a deep-sea trench, SpongeBob must chase a determined angler fish to retrieve it.

programme.desc: When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick and Squidina take care of her house. // After Plankton forgets who he is, the Dartfish family adopts him.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E805 - Europe Road Trip: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: The Louds travel to London when Luna receives an invitation to Mick Swagger's knighting ceremony but get caught up in a special mission when Lincoln runs into a familiar face.

programme.title: E511 - School of Shock / Elecshunned
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: E103 - Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and 'correct the record.

programme.title: E260 - Knock Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E1008 - Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E1005 - Personal Train Wreck
programme.desc: When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E515 - Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: E2 - Blood and Dust
programme.desc: Discover the clever way elephants dig wells, and see the relief that comes with a sudden river-filling downpour. Mourn cheetah Kuleta’s loss after lions kill one of her cubs, and get a front-row seat when wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: E6 - Bald is Beautiful
programme.desc: After a terrible accident at the nursery forest school, life changes drastically for nine-month-old Alejandra. And at forest school, the students enjoy a poolside classroom where Valentino proves he’s much more than just a class clown.

programme.title: E1 - Rhythm of the Bay
programme.desc: The Hudson Bay lowlands are part of North America’s largest wetland. Over 300,000 square kilometers of muskeg, a vast bogland as far as the eye can see characterized by water soaked peat, mosses and stunted trees. Once thought of as barren wasteland, it is now understood that these bogs are crucially important to life on earth. Globally, there is as much carbon dioxide held in wetlands as there is in the atmosphere. The peatland ecosystem is the most efficient carbon sink on the planet.

programme.title: E3 - Change in the Air
programme.desc: Watch life on the farm adjust as the leaves start to turn, from the sheep whose woolly coats keep them warm during the first frost to the bees that feed on the last bit of nectar before hibernation.

programme.title: E1 - The Fickle River
programme.desc: Travel to Samburu, where matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up. Then, in Naboisho, see cheetah mom Kuleta evade a crafty pack of hyenas. Later, in Laikipia, check in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter.

programme.title: E2 - Blood and Dust
programme.desc: Discover the clever way elephants dig wells, and see the relief that comes with a sudden river-filling downpour. Mourn cheetah Kuleta’s loss after lions kill one of her cubs, and get a front-row seat when wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: E1 - The Fickle River
programme.desc: Travel to Samburu, where matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up. Then, in Naboisho, see cheetah mom Kuleta evade a crafty pack of hyenas. Later, in Laikipia, check in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter.

programme.title: E2 - Blood and Dust
programme.desc: Discover the clever way elephants dig wells, and see the relief that comes with a sudden river-filling downpour. Mourn cheetah Kuleta’s loss after lions kill one of her cubs, and get a front-row seat when wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: E4 - Kakumbi Are Vulnerable
programme.desc: Encounter an elephant as Julz and Henry from the ZCP track the Kakumbi pups, who face off with a stubborn, razor-tusked warthog. Follow Thandie Mweetwa, ZCP’s lion specialist, who counts the prides that are pushing the Manzi out of their territory.

programme.title: E1 - The Fickle River
programme.desc: Travel to Samburu, where matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up. Then, in Naboisho, see cheetah mom Kuleta evade a crafty pack of hyenas. Later, in Laikipia, check in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter.

programme.title: E2 - Blood and Dust
programme.desc: Discover the clever way elephants dig wells, and see the relief that comes with a sudden river-filling downpour. Mourn cheetah Kuleta’s loss after lions kill one of her cubs, and get a front-row seat when wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E7 - The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Beni and Lala get an unexpected visit from Vet Arga, Kesi makes a new friend on Bangamat Island, and Alejandra deals with a new view of the world after the accident at forest school leaves her blind in one eye.

programme.title: E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E6 - Bald is Beautiful
programme.desc: After a terrible accident at the nursery forest school, life changes drastically for nine-month-old Alejandra. And at forest school, the students enjoy a poolside classroom where Valentino proves he’s much more than just a class clown.

programme.title: E7 - The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Beni and Lala get an unexpected visit from Vet Arga, Kesi makes a new friend on Bangamat Island, and Alejandra deals with a new view of the world after the accident at forest school leaves her blind in one eye.

programme.title: E1 - Rhythm of the Bay
programme.desc: The Hudson Bay lowlands are part of North America’s largest wetland. Over 300,000 square kilometers of muskeg, a vast bogland as far as the eye can see characterized by water soaked peat, mosses and stunted trees. Once thought of as barren wasteland, it is now understood that these bogs are crucially important to life on earth. Globally, there is as much carbon dioxide held in wetlands as there is in the atmosphere. The peatland ecosystem is the most efficient carbon sink on the planet.

programme.title: E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E52 - Aix-Les-Bains (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the Royal Abbey of Hautecombe and local plants.

programme.title: E4 - Are Tasty Non-Alcoholic Beers Possible?
programme.desc: While beer sales are declining, non-alcoholic beer sales are increasing with increasingly diverse ranges. Also on the program: tasty Egyptian dishes; tasting mustard and palm fruits.

programme.title: E16 - Finding Your Way In Dog Food
programme.desc: Raw, frozen, grain-free, freeze-dried, vegetarian, carnivorous or even insect-based... canine food is evolving, far from traditional kibble. Also featured: a taste test of cream cheeses; delicious monastic confectionery from Portugal.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E102
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E15 - Toulouse Museum/Laurent Pernot
programme.desc: Rendezvous at the Toulouse Museum! Poetry made form, using an incredible diversity of techniques and materials: we meet the artist Laurent Pernot.

programme.desc: In Grenoble, Loic Ballet meets the Glenat family, founders of the famous publishing house. This true literary institution is housed in the magnificent Sainte-Cecile convent, rich in history.

programme.title: E15 - Ludovic Van Rompu
programme.desc: Following his victory in the Meilleur Patissier competition, Ludovic Van Rompu, a former physics and chemistry teacher, turned his passion for cooking into a profession. On today's menu: mango dacquoise.

programme.title: E15 - Courchevel, The Destiny Of A Valley
programme.desc: An exceptional immersion into the heart of one of the most emblematic resorts in the French Alps: Courchevel. From the agricultural valley of the past to the world reference for skiing and luxury, its history is that of a territory shaped by the audacity of its pioneers and the passion of its inhabitants.

programme.title: E9 - Marseille With Gerald Passedat
programme.desc: Under the sign of the Grand Bleu, Gerald Passedat reveals all his secrets and shows us around the city of Marseille. From the terrace of his legendary Petit Nice, in the heart of the working-class Panier district, to the Calanques, the chef reveals the secret nooks and forgotten tastes of this city so dear to Pagnol.

programme.title: E67 - Mona Source, Eco-Friendly Fashion
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E7 - Iceland's Highland Lights
programme.desc: In Iceland, the Highlands lie 400 metres above sea level. Covering the same surface area as Switzerland and virtually uninhabited, they are one of Europe's last remaining wildernesses. Olivier Joly, journalist and photographer, invites us to discover his favourite spots, his friends and an age-old tradition: the Rettir.

programme.title: E4 - Chanel N°5/Wax
programme.desc: Everything about the origin of the Chanel N°5 perfume. A look back at wax, a fabric thought to be African but inspired by Indonesian batik.

programme.title: E7 - Iceland's Highland Lights
programme.desc: In Iceland, the Highlands lie 400 metres above sea level. programme.title: E6 - Deployer Les Moyens Pour Faire Briller Tout Un Village
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: E55 - Franco Brazilian Brunch In Eysines
programme.desc: In Eysines, near Bordeaux, Alessandra Montagne meets Elaine, the manager of a bakery mill. She highlights both local products and her Brazilian roots. On today's menu: creamy coffee flan and pao de queijo, small cheese puffs.

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E53 - Aix-Les-Bains (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on local ceramic art and the history of the Belle Epoque Theatre-Casino.

programme.title: E8 - Poached Haddock In Coconut Milk And Crunchy Salad
programme.desc: To entertain simply and stylishly, the chef offers a menu featuring haddock poached in coconut milk and a crunchy salad.

programme.title: E6 - Deployer Les Moyens Pour Faire Briller Tout Un Village
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: E55 - Franco Brazilian Brunch In Eysines
programme.desc: In Eysines, near Bordeaux, Alessandra Montagne meets Elaine, the manager of a bakery mill. She highlights both local products and her Brazilian roots. On today's menu: creamy coffee flan and pao de queijo, small cheese puffs.

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: E16 - Finding Your Way In Dog Food
programme.desc: Raw, frozen, grain-free, freeze-dried, vegetarian, carnivorous or even insect-based... canine food is evolving, far from traditional kibble. Also featured: a taste test of cream cheeses; delicious monastic confectionery from Portugal.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E14 - Glenat, A Grenoble Story
programme.desc: In Grenoble, Loic Ballet meets the Glenat family, founders of the famous publishing house. This true literary institution is housed in the magnificent Sainte-Cecile convent, rich in history.

programme.title: E8 - Poached Haddock In Coconut Milk And Crunchy Salad
programme.desc: To entertain simply and stylishly, the chef offers a menu featuring haddock poached in coconut milk and a crunchy salad.

programme.title: E6 - Deployer Les Moyens Pour Faire Briller Tout Un Village
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: The Pulse With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: Bloomberg Crypto covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping decentralised finance. Your weekly source for the latest news, analysis and interviews with the most influential stakeholders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance Of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: The Pulse With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: Test of Nerves
programme.desc: If Simon can't overcome his paralyzing fear of tests in time to renew his driver's license, Team Alien will be grounded. So Teresa enacts a plan to ensure Simon will have the worst road-test ever.

programme.title: Natterjack Toad
programme.desc: Franky Fox struggles to tell the difference between toads and frogs, despite the best efforts of Flip, Flop, and Flow. Binah and Grandad Badger have fun trying to see the world from the toad's point of view.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Lim Kai Yi: Puzzle Solving Superstar
programme.desc: Lim Kai Yi is a record-breaking puzzle solver and holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to solve ten Fifteen puzzles. Alan Pixsley learns the tips and tricks required to become a record-breaking solver from Lim.

programme.title: Chan Keng Ian: Cup Stacking King
programme.desc: Chan Keng Ian, a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder and a speed stacking sensation, shares the mental and physical techniques required to achieve the remarkable speed and precision in the popular sport of speed stacking.

programme.title: Future of Space Exploration
programme.desc: As technology rapidly advances, what does the future of space exploration look like? Join host Emily Calandrelli as she meets up with the world's leading experts and explores how we will travel through space in the future.

programme.title: Man v Monkey
programme.desc: The doctors go head-to-head in a man vs monkey contest to demonstrate the power of the pelvis. Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph take you on a safari, and the Cupboard of Everything is on the move to the 1950s.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: No Fear
programme.desc: Competition season is in full swing, and Josh and Kloe are preparing for the biggest competition on the British calendar. While Josh does all he can to calm his nerves, Kloe suffers an injury during practice, and things are not looking good.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

programme.title: Wind Power
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand get scientific with farts and they launch the Ouch- Mobile - a drop-in medical clinic. Dr. Chris trains as a nurse on a ward full of robotic patients and in the emergency room, one patient has a cut nose and another has burnt their hand.

programme.title: Always Believe In Yourself
programme.desc: Finally, it's competition time for the Acro gymnasts as they head off to Liverpool for the British Championships. Harry and George hope to make a great impression, and superstar choreographer Andrew has been called in to fine-tune the boys' performance.

programme.title: The Defence of the Bombardier Beetle
programme.desc: The bombardier beetle has evolved a special way to avoid being eaten. It mixes two chemicals together in its tummy which then explode out as a mixture of a protective chemical and boiling water. It has to be careful not to burn itself!

programme.title: Unhealthy Appetite
programme.desc: A puppy with a sore paw needs help, and the Junior Vets are in at the deep end when Lacey, the horse, undergoes major surgery. Johnny and Inel meet a cat with an unhealthy appetite for human snacks.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: Myths and Legends
programme.desc: After taking care of his daily chores, Howler ‘gets away from it all' by daydreaming about wonderful encounters! In the process, he takes us through various contemporary beliefs, myths and legends, powered by his very rich imagination.

programme.title: The Bake Mistake
programme.desc: In a fierce cooking competition, Darwin and Newts learn about the importance of yeast in order to make things rise.

programme.title: The Secret Admirer Mystery
programme.desc: When Alex receives an unsigned note from a “secret admirer”, he calls on Addison to help him find out who thinks he's so wonderful!

programme.title: Making Electricity
programme.desc: The power goes out just as Smorph is busting his best moves, meaning it's time to find out how electricity is made and to get the party going again.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: Ice Cream Stick
programme.desc: Ice cream isn't just fun for eating. Hepi and Briko come up with some sizzling ideas.

programme.title: Paper Plate
programme.desc: Do you want to find out how we can use paper plates? The possibilities are endless and Hepi and Briko surprise us with their ideas.

programme.title: Medium Size Boom
programme.desc: Boom invents a weapon that can make anything into a diamond. This way, he can both destroy everything and get rich. Fortunately, Sprinter is there to stop his crazy plan.

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Trip to Netherlands
programme.desc: On which day in December should people receive their presents? Zoe and Milo are sure that it should be on Christmas, but Alim explains that in some countries, this happens on December 6th. They travel to the Netherlands and learn the story of St. Nicholas.

programme.title: Trip to Burkina Faso
programme.desc: In Burkina Faso, our heroes' penfriend Jamal can't wait to introduce Zoe and Milo to his parents, and like Alim, he appears to have several mums and dads. What a mystery!

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: Doki figures that to be a knight, all you had to do was joust. Gabi thinks there was more to it than that – but what did you have to do to become a knight? To find out, they head to a medieval festival in England and discover the true meaning of ‘chivalry'.

programme.title: Hedgehog - Deeper Underground
programme.desc: The hedgehog has dug a beautiful hole. Lovely, except that he made it so deep that he can not climb out. He creates an escape tunnel, but it only takes him further and further away. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Ice Giants
programme.desc: One sunny morning, a toy boat sinks during a backyard race. Was it an iceberg? Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde become icebergs to discover what they are and why they matter.

programme.title: A School For Fairy Tales
programme.desc: Rose, a girl obsessed with fairy tales, tumbles into Fairy Tale Land, where characters have aged. At Regal Academy under 'Granny' Cinderella, with Hawk, Joy, Astoria, and Travis, she wonders if she's Cinderella's lost granddaughter.

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: Doki figures that to be a knight, all you had to do was joust. Gabi thinks there was more to it than that – but what did you have to do to become a knight? To find out, they head to a medieval festival in England and discover the true meaning of ‘chivalry'.

programme.title: Quebec
programme.desc: Quebec winter thrill: Dogsledding, ice sculpting, hockey lesson with local teens, and extreme sledding at Village Vacances Valcartier. A week of icy adventures with Nicole in Canada!

programme.title: New Orleans
programme.desc: New Orleans charm: Culinary delights at New Orleans School of Cooking, swamp tour with alligators, Habitat for Humanity in the 9th ward, and jazz appreciation at a local music club. A week of rich experiences with Nicole and local teens in the vibrant city!

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Attention Please
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy are sent to the Principal for messing around, and become subjects of a new experiment in behaviour-control.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Parrot
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Parrot. It turns out that Parrot has been left a secret treasure map by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Heron the Inventor
programme.desc: Welcome to the home of the famous engineer Heron of Alexandria! You'll be greeted by the world's first robot, and that won't be the only surprise on this tour of the premises, which are packed with absolutely astonishing inventions for such an ancient time!

programme.title: Repetition
programme.desc: Computers can repeat an action over and over with great efficiency. Find out why repetition is so important in computer programming.

programme.title: Kaden Galatiuk: Ice Hockey Phenomenon
programme.desc: Hockey prodigy Kaden Galatiuk meets Alan Pixsley and shares how he used his razor-sharp precision to achieve the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most hockey pucks hit into a target on inline skates in one minute.

programme.title: Killer Debris from Space
programme.desc: It is all around us, yet we can't see it. Space debris is orbiting our planet in increasing numbers and could pose risks to both astronauts in space and humans on earth. Join Emily Calandrelli as she explores what exactly 'space junk' is and how we track it.

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: Garage Sale
programme.desc: When the garage sale turns out to be not as expected, the hosts are looking for the help of a special celebrity.

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: Treasure of the Islanders
programme.desc: After Dolos has sold two maps to the same treasure, the pirates and the Nektons are racing to get to the treasure first!

programme.title: Ruby's Smelly Foot
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are on the farm, hoping to discover some pregnant cows. Poor Fern, the lurcher, has been abandoned and needs a new home. Ruby, the lamb, has a smelly infected foot, and Johnny and Inel meet a dog who likes to join the family for dinner!

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets meet some feisty meerkats who need their claws trimmed, but first, they've got to catch them. Ashanti, the elephant, gets his feet and tail cleaned. Johnny and Inel discover what you get when you cross a lion and a tiger.

programme.title: The Bake Mistake
programme.desc: In a fierce cooking competition, Darwin and Newts learn about the importance of yeast in order to make things rise.

programme.title: Trip to Netherlands

programme.title: No Fear
programme.desc: Competition season is in full swing, and Josh and Kloe are preparing for the biggest competition on the British calendar. While Josh does all he can to calm his nerves, Kloe suffers an injury during practice, and things are not looking good.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Tom And Jerry
programme.desc: When Jerry moves into the best hotel in New York on the eve of the wedding of the century, the event planner hires Tom to get rid of him. However, the ensuing cat and mouse battle threatens to destroy her career, the wedding and possibly the hotel.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: In this new take on the tragic love story, a seasoned musician discovers and falls in love with a struggling artiste.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: Mickey Barnes is working for an employer who demands to die for a living.

programme.title: E5 - Everything Is A Copy
programme.desc: While Sadie must defend herself at work, Kimberlyn prepares for her engagement party, and Lola contemplates a new relationship.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Ben Richards must outwit the Network in this fun, unhinged deadly game show where his unexpected fandom threatens to dismantle the entire system.

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: Survivors of a suspension-bridge collapse learn that there is no way to Death.

programme.title: E1168
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Keanu
programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Tricked into rescuing a boy from an island that once bred dinosaurs, a paleontologist discovers that its inhabitants are deadlier than he imagined.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Rachel McAdams and Harrison Ford star in this romantic comedy set in the hilarious and dysfunctional world of morning television.

programme.desc: A woman opens a chocolate shop in a French town and creates confections that inspire the straitlaced villagers to abandon themselves to temptation and happiness.

programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: The Wife
programme.desc: Varun and Arya move into a new home for a fresh start, but a dark supernatural force turns their dream into terror and tragic consequences. Release Year: 2021 Director: Sarmad Khan

programme.title: Jurm
programme.desc: A powerful businessman is jailed for his wife's murder, forcing him to unravel betrayal and hidden truths while his perfect world collapses around him. Release Year: 1990 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.title: Ishqedarriyaan
programme.desc: Aagam loves Luvleen deeply, but she loves Arjun. Choosing her happiness over his own, Aagam sacrifices his heart so she can live the life she truly wants. Release Year: 2015 Director: V.K. Prakash

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Bob Biswas
programme.desc: Bob Biswas, an insurance agent, is released from hospital after eight years in a coma and is welcomed by his wife Mary and son Benny. He has lost his memory and does not remember the past. Release Year: 2021 Director: Diya Annapurna Ghosh

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: Discover how irresistibly flaky sausage rolls were formerly a snack fit for just a king; fluffy, sugary Peeps marshmallows come out looking like adorable baby chicks; bright colored Candy Tree lollipops get their sweet and sour flavor.

programme.title: E1 - Congo
programme.desc: Simon Reeve battles his way across the Congo, braving thick jungle and tropical swamps in search of the people and the wildlife who make their home in Africa's greatest rainforest.

programme.title: E4 - Romania
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Discover how smooth caramel and milky chocolate combine with pretzels to produce a perfect salty sweet snack; the makers of Jelly Bellys get those mouth-watering flavours into their jellybeans; lip-smacking Korean dumplings are jam-packed with savory spices and healthy veggies.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Discover how sweet and crunchy Boston Baked Beans are made to be the candy version of a traditional side dish; the tangy strawberry filling in a Welch's fruit yogurt snack receives a creamy coating; brocato, a cheesy Scottish breakfast pie, gets its stand up pastry shell.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In Paris, Sue samples insects and absinthe, models for Paris Fashion Week, and crashes a cabaret.

programme.title: E1 - Origins
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, our ancient powers are just beginning, they must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.desc: Discover how the makers of doubly delicious 'Tortetufo' get one chocolate praline mousse cake inside another; plain chick peas are transformed into yummy boondi, a spicy, crunchy Indian snack; sinfully tender, frosted sugar cookies come out of the oven a technicolor treat.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Discover how Amy's Kitchen wraps up their scrumptious rice and pinto bean burritos; an Oregon-based company adds a double shot of bacon to lip smacking fried rice that never meets the fryer; sweet little Maraschino cherries get their signature colour.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan: Super-Dimension! The Storm Called My Bride
programme.desc: Shinchan Nohara sends a girl named Tamiko on a mission to bring his five-year-old self to that time period right before being captured. Reaching the past, she claims to be Shinchan's bride and takes him and his friends on a wild adventure to try to save the world to come.

programme.title: Be With You: The Narrow Road
programme.desc: Under this flashy city, amidst the numbness of frustrations, what people are looking forward to is the glimmer of light that might change their lives. Chak, who runs a small cleaning company, barely takes over the cleaning work on his own to make a living. Hitting by the COVID-19 pandemic, small business closed down one by one. One day, a young single mother, Candy, comes to look for a job opportunity from Chak. She doesn't seem like a trustworthy person to Chak, unexpectedly, she helps Chak to resolve many difficulties at work. Life seems like get back on track. The morning sun never lasts a day, Chak's company is being accused, at the same time, his family is facing a nightmare as well, all his hopes are dashed to pieces, but they can still try their best to resist the oppression of life and support each other through this painful year.

programme.title: Exiled
programme.desc: Two hit men from Hong Kong sent to take out a renegade member trying to turn over a new leaf with his wife and newborn baby. They soon find themselves in the throes of a dilemma when two of their former associates also show up, intent on thwarting them at every cost...

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: “I've decided my own future” Near the Korean Demilitarized Zone, in a North Korean frontline military unit, Sgt. Kyu-nam is nearing the end of his ten-year service. Discontent with the lack of future prospects in the North, he plans to escape beyond the barbed wire to a place where he can freely pursue his desires. However, when a junior soldier, Dong-hyuk, discovers Kyu-nam's plan and attempts to escape first, Kyu-nam is caught in a sudden twist of fate, leading to his arrest as a defector. “Don't be distracted and accept it. This is your fate.” State Security officer Hyun-sang arrives at the base to investigate the defector. Recognizing Kyu-nam from his childhood, Hyun-sang manipulates the situation to turn Kyu-nam into a hero who captured the defector, thereby boosting his own credentials and securing a position as a special assistant to the division commander.But when Kyu-nam makes a determined effort to escape, Hyun-sang is left with no choice but to begin an unyielding

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan: Very Tasty! B-class Gourmet Survival!!
programme.desc: Shin-chan and the Kasukabe Defense Corps undertake a mission to carry the legendary sauce of B-class Gourmet to the B-Class carnival. The sauce is very important for B-class Gourmet. A mysterious A-Class Gourmet group led by Gourmet-Poy has taken over the carnival. Can Shin-chan and the Kasukabe Defense Corps carry out their mission and bring happiness to the ordinary people?

programme.title: Be With You: Wish Comes True
programme.desc: Abandoned by her mother, Xiaofei, a positive and cheerful girl, encounters a 'Wish Come True Machine' that can fulfil people's wishes, and forms a bond with a young talent named Wai who suffers from a rare disease. While Xiaofei is finding the lost lover of Wai, it is discovered that the new medicine for treating Wai's rare disease is ineffective. However, life affects life. Although Xiaofei and Wai are hit hard by fate, they decided to continue their love and hope.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

The Yuppie Fantasia
programme.desc: Leung Foon is one of those youthful, upward-moving people. He is 33, middle rung officer of an advertising agency, and has been married eight years to Ann. Ann holds down a key post in a finance company. She also likes to manage Foon's life. The couple has been drifting apart. A quarrel and the two decide to separate. Q-Taro and Big Cheat, Foon's colleagues and close friends, like to fool around. Q is married to the city shrew while Big Cheat's wife puts him above everything else. Foon has a new boss, Mrs. Lam who wants to rid the agency of useless employees. She forces Foon to fire Q-Taro...

programme.title: Operation Scorpio
programme.desc: Fei comes to Hong Kong with his son Yushu and winds up a back-alley barber. Yushu is now in high school but he only likes to draw pictures. He also is hot blooded, thus often getting into fights. By accident, Yushu meets beautiful Ru. He learns that Inspector Hua and underworld boss Wang are working together in prostitution and human traffic. Yushu helps Ru to escape from Wang 's catches. Fei, Yushu and Ru are being haunted by Hua's men, but are saved by self-styled kungfu master Jean-Paul. They are taken in by Master Yi and asks Yushu to prepare the beef noodles but he only wants to learn kungfu from Jean-Paul. However, Yushu realizes Master Yi actually is the kungfu master. He begs Master Yi to teach him the skills and fight against evil forces together...

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Cheung Long is instructed to take up the identity as convict to get acquainted to Lee Wan Fay who is a stolen goods dealer. In the course of escaping from Big Mad, an opponent of Fay, both Long and Fay grow a good feeling towards each other. When Long's supervisor wants to use Fay to bait Big Mad, Long saves Fay and tells him the truth...

programme.title: Burning Paradise
programme.desc: Rumors have it that the Shaolin Temple is harbouring revolutionaries. The emperor believes the rumors and decides to wipe out the temple. Fong Sai-yuk escapes with his uncle to the desert. There they run into Tou Tou. Yuk's uncle is killed by the king's general, and Tou and Yuk are captured. They are taken to the Red Lotus Temple; the temple is run by Elder Kung. Hung Hei Koon, has already joined Elder Kung and voluntarily becomes his protege. Yuk looks for every chance to escape but is stopped by Koon and Koon is just pretending to have joined Elder Kung. With Koon's help, Yuk finally defeats Elder Kung...

programme.title: Flaming Brothers
programme.desc: Wing and Fat have the same burning ambition to be big in the underworld. They struggle and are doing very well, so well the kingpin of the gangs wants to get rid of them. Wing and Fat are forced to fight back, then the showdown comes...

programme.title: Born Wild
programme.desc: Twin brothers Tan and Tide had been fought for the best until Tan died. Tide investigates the death and meets Tan's lover Sandy. Tide finds himself being attracted to her warmth...

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: MA and KAU were the Senior Inspectors of Narcotics Bureau. They were smuggling with the Golden Triangle in Thailand. CHEUNG – an officer of Custom Department. CHEUNG and MA were good friend since they studied in the University. MA's group wanted to get more help in custom, he asked CHEUNG to be his partner, but CHEUNG refused. While KAU was very hasty, he killed all CHEUNG's family. Then, CHEUNG wanted to take revenge against them. However, MA and KAU made a plan to get CHEUNG into trouble. At last, CHEUNG escaped to Thailand and stayed at his aunt's house. MA and KAU knew that CHEUNG escaped to Thailand, so they tried their best to kill him, but they did not succeed...

programme.title: The Sword
programme.desc: Swords, like diamonds, sometimes carry a curse. And the famous sword Chi Mud is such a sword. When swordmaster Wah acquires Chi Mud, he is advised to destroy it or he will be killed by this very sword. Wah does not listen. He has already retired into seclusion and does not think the young swordsmen can find and challenge him. Li is such a young swordsman. He even has dueled and killed another young challenger. Li by accident saves a young girl from a professional killer. In a few days, the girl and Li become friends. But the girl leaves in anger when Li meets his old flame Hsiao Yue, now married to Lin Wan. Li is ambushed by killer Chan...

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: By the early twenty centuries, there was a great disaster in Guang Xi. The myth of ghosts and plagues were overwhelmingly perplexed people in the Phoenix City. In order to ease the pain of the villagers, a medical group were commanded to stay in the Church of the Phoenix City. Unfortunately, the church was actually the home of the ghosts...
